title: ISO 13485:2016 §7.3 — Design and Development
content: Design and development planning shall include: design stages, review/verification/validation activities at each stage, responsibilities, and methods to ensure traceability. For software-generated medical device designs, IEC 62304 software lifecycle processes apply.

title: ISO 13485:2016 §4.2.5 — Control of Records
content: Records shall be maintained to provide evidence of conformity. For CAD-generated AFOs: complete parameter history, agent decision logs, all iteration snapshots, human review decisions with timestamps, and file integrity hashes (SHA-256) for all exported STL/STEP files.

title: ISO 13485:2016 §8.2.1 — Feedback and Complaints
content: Post-market surveillance processes must capture: device fit issues, skin reactions, mechanical failures, patient complaints. For pediatric AFOs, 30-day follow-up assessments are recommended to capture growth-related fit issues and gait improvement metrics.
